description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has four jobs: build-emscripten, build-nacl, collect-coverage, and post-results-comment. Each job runs on ubuntu-latest and checks out the repository. The build-emscripten and build-nacl jobs install build dependencies, compile, test, and upload built app packages. The collect-coverage job builds a coverage report and outputs the line coverage percentage. The post-results-comment job posts a comment on the pull request with the test results and coverage percentage.
